description: Hand-curated off-corpus topic seeds for Block 3B.2 refusal training data. Each seed names a topic NOT covered by the HuggingFace Transformers documentation. The seeder generates ~3 questions per seed via Haiku 4.5, pairs each with retrieved chunks (which won't actually answer the question), and uses the result as a training example teaching the canonical refusal phrase. Three categories: adjacent_ml (ML topics outside transformers), general_cs (developer questions outside ML), unrelated (calibration sanity-check). Target: ~30 seeds × ~3 queries = ~90 off-corpus refusals (slight buffer over the 80 target).

seeds.topic: TensorFlow graph mode and tf.function tracing internals
seeds.notes: HF docs reference TensorFlow model loading; tracing internals are TF-specific.

seeds.topic: JAX HLO compilation and XLA optimization passes
seeds.notes: HF has Flax model support; XLA compilation internals are not covered.

seeds.topic: XGBoost hyperparameter tuning and tree pruning strategies
Reinforcement learning algorithms (PPO, SAC, DDPG)
seeds.notes: HF has TRL for RLHF, but classical RL algorithm theory is not covered.

seeds.topic: OpenCV image processing pipelines and feature detection
Time series forecasting with Prophet and ARIMA models
Bayesian inference with PyMC and variational methods
ONNX Runtime graph optimization passes and operator fusion
seeds.notes: HF docs cover ONNX export; runtime-side optimization is not.

seeds.topic: Pinecone and Weaviate vector database sharding architecture
seeds.notes: HF uses FAISS for some dataset operations; vector DB internals are out-of-scope.

seeds.topic: TorchServe and NVIDIA Triton Inference Server deployment
Linux kernel CFS scheduler and process priority
AWS Lambda cold start optimization techniques
AWS S3 bucket lifecycle policies and storage class transitions
Docker networking modes and bridge driver configuration
Kubernetes operator pattern and Custom Resource Definitions
PostgreSQL VACUUM scheduling and bloat management
Redis RDB and AOF persistence trade-offs
Git object model, packfiles, and reflog garbage collection
Bash signal handling and trap commands for cleanup
TCP congestion control algorithms (Reno, Cubic, BBR)
LLVM optimization passes and IR transformations
Raft consensus algorithm and leader election
Cooking techniques and food chemistry
Music theory, harmony, and chord progressions
Sports analytics and performance metrics
International travel planning and visa requirements
Personal finance, investing, and retirement planning
Home repair and DIY plumbing projects
Vegetable gardening and soil preparation
